tool_messages.content: {"skill_name": "local_file_search", "status": "success", "input": {"query": "tool calling", "file_types": ["txt", "md"], "top_k": 5}, "output": {"query": "tool calling", "root_dir": ".", "files_scanned": 11, "total_matches": 3, "truncated_files": 0, "skipped_files": 0, "results": [{"path": "b1_cases/README.md", "score": 63.239, "snippet": "...Shell 中执行 B1 测试用例 ### 执行综合批量测试 ```powershell python .\\code\\b1_agent_runtime_1.py ` --batch_input .\\data\\b1_cases\\b1_all_features_batch.json ` --tools_config .\\configs\\tools.yaml `\n...\nconfigs\\model.yaml ` --outdir .\\outputs\\B1_test_cases `..."}, {"path": "docs/tool_calling.md", "score": 38.452, "snippet": "# Tool Calling 模型负责决定是否调用工具，工具层负责校验和执行，运行时负责维护消息闭环。"}, {"path": "docs/search_skill_demo.md", "score": 6.197, "snippet": "# Search Skill Demo 检索演示文档用于验证 local_file_search 工具。 当用户询问“检索演示 工具编排”时，搜索工具应能命中这个文件。 工具编排强调模型先决定调用哪个工具，再由运行时执行工具并把 ToolMessage 返回给模型。"}], "compressed": false, "original_result_count": 3}, "error": null, "latency_ms": 3.954}
